```text
     1→import type { BlockAnchor, RangeAnchor } from './types'
     2→
     3→export interface BlockInfo {
     4→  index: number
     5→  blockId: string
     6→  type: string
     7→  textContent: string
     8→  fingerprint: string
     9→}
    10→
    11→export function computeBlockFingerprint(text: string): string {
    12→  const input = text.slice(0, 200) + String(text.length)
    13→  let hash = 5381
    14→  for (let i = 0; i < input.length; i++) {
    15→    hash = ((hash << 5) + hash + (input.codePointAt(i) ?? 0)) | 0
    16→  }
    17→  return (hash >>> 0).toString(16)
    18→}
    19→
    20→function getNodeType(node: Record<string, any>): string {
    21→  return node.type as string
    22→}
    23→
    24→function getTextContent(node: Record<string, any>): string {
    25→  if (typeof node.text === 'string') return node.text
    26→  if (node.type === 'linebreak') return '\n'
    27→  if (Array.isArray(node.children)) {
    28→    return (node.children as Record<string, any>[]).map(getTextContent).join('')
    29→  }
    30→  return ''
    31→}
    32→
    33→export function extractBlockInfos(content: string): BlockInfo[] {
    34→  let parsed: Record<string, any>
    35→  try {
    36→    parsed = JSON.parse(content)
    37→  } catch {
    38→    return []
    39→  }
    40→
    41→  const rootChildren = parsed.root?.children as
    42→    | Record<string, any>[]
    43→    | undefined
    44→  if (!rootChildren) return []
    45→
    46→  return rootChildren.map((child, index) => {
    47→    const blockId = (child.$ as Record<string, any> | undefined)?.blockId as
    48→      | string
    49→      | undefined
    50→    const textContent = getTextContent(child)
    51→    return {
    52→      index,
    53→      blockId: blockId || '',
    54→      type: getNodeType(child),
    55→      textContent,
    56→      fingerprint: computeBlockFingerprint(textContent),
    57→    }
    58→  })
    59→}
    60→
    61→export function findBlockIndex(contentEl: Element, node: Node): number {
    62→  const { children } = contentEl
    63→  let current: Node | null = node
    64→  while (current && current !== contentEl) {
    65→    if (current.parentNode === contentEl) {
    66→      for (let i = 0; i < children.length; i++) {
    67→        if (children[i] === current) return i
    68→      }
    69→      return -1
    70→    }
    71→    current = current.parentNode
    72→  }
    73→  return -1
    74→}
    75→
    76→export function getTextOffset(
    77→  container: Element,
    78→  targetNode: Node,
    79→  targetOffset: number,
    80→): number {
    81→  const walker = document.createTreeWalker(
    82→    container,
    83→    NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT | NodeFilter.SHOW_ELEMENT,
    84→    {
    85→      acceptNode(node) {
    86→        if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT
    87→        if (node instanceof HTMLBRElement) return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT
    88→        return NodeFilter.FILTER_SKIP
    89→      },
    90→    },
    91→  )
    92→  let offset = 0
    93→  let node: Node | null
    94→  while ((node = walker.nextNode())) {
    95→    if (node === targetNode) {
    96→      return offset + targetOffset
    97→    }
    98→    if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) {
    99→      offset += (node as Text).length
   100→    } else if (node instanceof HTMLBRElement) {
   101→      offset += 1
   102→    }
   103→  }
   104→  return offset
   105→}
   106→
   107→export function buildRangeAnchorFromSelection(
   108→  sel: Selection,
   109→  contentEl: Element,
   110→  blockInfos: BlockInfo[],
   111→): RangeAnchor | null {
   112→  const { anchorNode, anchorOffset, focusNode, focusOffset } = sel
   113→  if (!anchorNode || !focusNode) return null
   114→
   115→  const anchorBlockIdx = findBlockIndex(contentEl, anchorNode)
   116→  const focusBlockIdx = findBlockIndex(contentEl, focusNode)
   117→  if (anchorBlockIdx < 0 || focusBlockIdx < 0) return null
   118→  if (anchorBlockIdx !== focusBlockIdx) return null
   119→
   120→  const info = blockInfos[anchorBlockIdx]
   121→  if (!info?.blockId) return null
   122→
   123→  const blockEl = contentEl.children[anchorBlockIdx]
   124→  if (!blockEl) return null
   125→
   126→  let startOffset = getTextOffset(blockEl, anchorNode, anchorOffset)
   127→  let endOffset = getTextOffset(blockEl, focusNode, focusOffset)
   128→  if (startOffset > endOffset) {
   129→    ;[startOffset, endOffset] = [endOffset, startOffset]
   130→  }
   131→
   132→  const text = info.textContent
   133→  const quote = text.slice(startOffset, endOffset)
   134→  if (!quote) return null
   135→
   136→  return {
   137→    mode: 'range',
   138→    blockId: info.blockId,
   139→    blockType: info.type,
   140→    blockFingerprint: info.fingerprint,
   141→    snapshotText: text.slice(0, 300),
   142→    quote,
   143→    prefix: text.slice(Math.max(0, startOffset - 50), startOffset),
   144→    suffix: text.slice(endOffset, endOffset + 50),
   145→    startOffset,
   146→    endOffset,
   147→  }
   148→}
   149→
   150→export function buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(
   151→  blockInfos: BlockInfo[],
   152→  index: number,
   153→): BlockAnchor | null {
   154→  const info = blockInfos[index]
   155→  if (!info?.blockId) return null
   156→
   157→  return {
   158→    mode: 'block',
   159→    blockId: info.blockId,
   160→    blockType: info.type,
   161→    blockFingerprint: info.fingerprint,
   162→    snapshotText: info.textContent.slice(0, 300),
   163→  }
   164→}
   165→
```

<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/Comments.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { BusinessEvents } from '@mx-space/webhook'
     4→import type { FC } from 'react'
     5→import { memo, useEffect } from 'react'
     6→
     7→import { ErrorBoundary } from '~/components/common/ErrorBoundary'
     8→import { BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView } from '~/components/ui/transition'
     9→import { useTypeScriptHappyCallback } from '~/hooks/common/use-callback'
    10→import { WsEvent } from '~/socket/util'
    11→
    12→import { Comment } from './Comment'
    13→import { CommentBoxProvider } from './CommentBox/providers'
    14→import { CommentProvider, useUpdateComment } from './CommentProvider'
    15→import type { CommentBaseProps } from './types'
    16→
    17→export const Comments: FC<CommentBaseProps> = ({ refId }) => {
    18→  return (
    19→    <ErrorBoundary>
    20→      <CommentProvider refId={refId}>
    21→        {useTypeScriptHappyCallback(
    22→          (data) => {
    23→            // sort by pin
    24→            const comments = data?.pages.flatMap((data) => data.data)
    25→
    26→            return (
    27→              <ul className="min-h-[400px] list-none space-y-4">
    28→                {comments.map((comment) => (
    29→                  <BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView key={comment.id}>
    30→                    <CommentListItem commentId={comment.id} refId={refId} />
    31→                  </BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView>
    32→                ))}
    33→                <CommentEventHandler refId={refId} />
    34→              </ul>
    35→            )
    36→          },
    37→          [refId],
    38→        )}
    39→      </CommentProvider>
    40→    </ErrorBoundary>
    41→  )
    42→}
    43→
    44→const CommentListItem: FC<{ commentId: string; refId: string }> = memo(
    45→  function CommentListItem({ commentId, refId }) {
    46→    return (
    47→      <CommentBoxProvider refId={refId}>
    48→        <Comment commentId={commentId} />
    49→      </CommentBoxProvider>
    50→    )
    51→  },
    52→)
    53→
    54→const CommentEventHandler = ({ refId }: { refId: string }) => {
    55→  useEffect(() => {
    56→    const currentTitle = document.title
    57→
    58→    // 当标签页回复前台状态时，将标题重置
    59→    const onVisibilityChange = () => {
    60→      if (document.visibilityState === 'visible') {
    61→        document.title = currentTitle
    62→      }
    63→    }
    64→    document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', onVisibilityChange)
    65→
    66→    const cleaner = WsEvent.on(BusinessEvents.COMMENT_CREATE, (data) => {
    67→      if (
    68→        data.ref === refId && // 如果标签页在后台
    69→        document.visibilityState === 'hidden'
    70→      ) {
    71→        document.title = `新评论！${currentTitle}`
    72→      }
    73→    })
    74→    return () => {
    75→      cleaner()
    76→      document.removeEventListener('visibilitychange', onVisibilityChange)
    77→    }
    78→  }, [refId])
    79→  const updateCommentUI = useUpdateComment()
    80→  useEffect(() => {
    81→    const cleaner = WsEvent.on(BusinessEvents.COMMENT_UPDATE, (data) => {
    82→      updateCommentUI({
    83→        id: data.id,
    84→        text: data.text,
    85→      })
    86→    })
    87→    return () => {
    88→      cleaner()
    89→    }
    90→  }, [updateCommentUI])
    91→  return null
    92→}
    93→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { useInfiniteQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     2→import { useMemo } from 'react'
     3→
     4→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
     5→import { buildCommentsQueryKey } from '~/queries/keys'
     6→
     7→export function useCommentsQuery(refId: string) {
     8→  const key = useMemo(() => buildCommentsQueryKey(refId), [refId])
     9→  const { data, isLoading, fetchNextPage, hasNextPage } = useInfiniteQuery({
    10→    queryKey: key,
    11→    queryFn: async ({ queryKey, pageParam }) => {
    12→      const page = pageParam
    13→      const [, refId] = queryKey as [string, string]
    14→      const data = await apiClient.comment.getByRefId(refId, {
    15→        page,
    16→      })
    17→
    18→      return data.$serialized
    19→    },
    20→
    21→    meta: {
    22→      persist: false,
    23→    },
    24→    getNextPageParam: (lastPage) =>
    25→      lastPage.pagination.hasNextPage
    26→        ? lastPage.pagination.currentPage + 1
    27→        : undefined,
    28→    getPreviousPageParam: (firstPage) => firstPage.pagination.currentPage - 1,
    29→    initialPageParam: 1 as number | undefined,
    30→  })
    31→
    32→  return {
    33→    data,
    34→    isLoading,
    35→    fetchNextPage,
    36→    hasNextPage,
    37→  }
    38→}
    39→
```

```text
     4→  ReaderModel,
     5→} from '@mx-space/api-client'
     6→import type { InfiniteData } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     7→import { createContextState } from 'foxact/create-context-state'
     8→import type { PrimitiveAtom } from 'jotai'
     9→import { atom, useAtomValue } from 'jotai'
    10→import { selectAtom } from 'jotai/utils'
    11→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
    12→import type { FC, ReactNode } from 'react'
    13→import {
    14→  createContext as createReactContext,
    15→  use,
    16→  useCallback,
    17→  useEffect,
    18→  useMemo,
    19→} from 'react'
    20→import { createContext, useContextSelector } from 'use-context-selector'
    21→
    22→import { NotSupport } from '~/components/common/NotSupport'
    23→import { useRefValue } from '~/hooks/common/use-ref-value'
    24→import { jotaiStore } from '~/lib/store'
    25→
    26→import { LoadMoreIndicator } from '../shared/LoadMoreIndicator'
    27→import { CommentSkeleton } from './CommentSkeleton'
    28→import { useCommentsQuery } from './hooks'
    29→
    30→const CommentReaderMapContext = createContext<Record<string, ReaderModel>>({})
    31→const CommentListContext = createReactContext<
    32→  PrimitiveAtom<Record<string, CommentModel & { new?: boolean }>>
    33→>(null!)
    34→
    35→export const [
    36→  CommentMarkdownContainerRefContext,
    37→  useCommentMarkdownContainerRef,
    38→  useCommentMarkdownContainerRefSetter,
    39→] = createContextState<HTMLDivElement | null>(null)
    40→
    41→export const CommentProvider: FC<{
    42→  refId: string
    43→  children: (
    44→    data: InfiniteData<
    45→      PaginateResult<
    46→        CommentModel & {
    47→          ref: string
    48→        }
    49→      > & {
    50→        readers: Record<string, ReaderModel>
    51→      }
    52→    >,
    53→    commentAtom: PrimitiveAtom<
    54→      Record<string, CommentModel & { new?: boolean }>
    55→    >,
    56→  ) => ReactNode
    57→}> = ({ children, refId }) => {
    58→  const t = useTranslations('comment')
    59→  const commentAtom = useRefValue(() =>
    60→    atom({} as Record<string, CommentModel & { new?: boolean }>),
    61→  )
    62→
    63→  const { data, isLoading, fetchNextPage, hasNextPage } =
    64→    useCommentsQuery(refId)
    65→
    66→  useEffect(() => {
    67→    if (!data) return
    68→    const commentsMap = Object.assign({}, jotaiStore.get(commentAtom))
    69→    function dts(comments: CommentModel[]) {
    70→      for (const comment of comments) {
    71→        commentsMap[comment.id] = comment
    72→
    73→        if (comment.children) {
    74→          dts(comment.children)
    75→        }
    76→      }
    77→    }
    78→
    79→    dts(data.pages.flatMap((page) => page.data))
    80→
    81→    jotaiStore.set(commentAtom, commentsMap)
    82→  }, [commentAtom, data])
    83→
    84→  const readers = useMemo(() => {
    85→    if (!data) return {}
    86→    return data?.pages.reduce(
    87→      (acc, curr) => ({ ...acc, ...curr.readers }),
    88→      {} as Record<string, ReaderModel>,
    89→    )
    90→  }, [data])
    91→
    92→  if (isLoading) {
    93→    return <CommentSkeleton />
    94→  }
    95→  if (!data || data.pages.length === 0 || data.pages[0].data.length === 0)
    96→    return (
    97→      <div className="center flex min-h-[400px]">
    98→        <NotSupport text={t('no_comments_yet')} />
    99→      </div>
   100→    )
   101→
   102→  return (
   103→    <CommentReaderMapContext.Provider value={readers}>
   104→      <CommentListContext value={commentAtom}>
   105→        {children(data, commentAtom)}
   106→
   107→        {hasNextPage && (
   108→          <LoadMoreIndicator onLoading={fetchNextPage}>
   109→            <CommentSkeleton />
   110→          </LoadMoreIndicator>
   111→        )}
   112→      </CommentListContext>
   113→    </CommentReaderMapContext.Provider>
   114→  )
   115→}
   116→
   117→export const useCommentReader = (readerId?: string) => {
   118→  return useContextSelector(CommentReaderMapContext, (v) =>
   119→    readerId ? v[readerId] : undefined,
   120→  )
   121→}
   122→
   123→export const useCommentByIdSelector = <T,>(
   124→  commentId: string,
   125→  selector: (comment?: CommentModel) => T,
   126→): T => {
   127→  const commentsAtom = use(CommentListContext)
   128→  return useAtomValue(
   129→    useMemo(
   130→      () => selectAtom(commentsAtom, (v) => selector(v[commentId])),
   131→      [commentsAtom, selector, commentId],
   132→    ),
   133→  )
   134→}
   135→
   136→export const useCommentById = (commentId: string) => {
   137→  const commentsAtom = use(CommentListContext)
   138→  return useAtomValue(
   139→    useMemo(
   140→      () => selectAtom(commentsAtom, (v) => v[commentId]),
   141→      [commentsAtom, commentId],
   142→    ),
   143→  )
   144→}
   145→
   146→export const useUpdateComment = () => {
   147→  const commentsAtom = use(CommentListContext)
   148→  return useCallback(
   149→    (comment: Partial<CommentModel> & { id: string }) => {
   150→      jotaiStore.set(commentsAtom, (prev) => {
   151→        const newComments = {
   152→          ...prev,
   153→          [comment.id]: {
   154→            ...prev[comment.id],
   155→            ...comment,
   156→            editedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
   157→          },
   158→        }
   159→
   160→        return newComments
   161→      })
   162→    },
   163→    [commentsAtom],
   164→  )
   165→}
   166→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    36→export const FloatPopover = function <T extends {}>(

    50→        : null
    51→

    54→        {Child}
    55→      </PresentSheet>
    56→    )
    57→  }
    58→  return <RealFloatPopover {...props} />
    59→}

   119→    as: As = 'div',
   120→    type = 'popover',
   121→    triggerComponentProps,
   122→    isDisabled,
   123→    onOpen,
   124→    onClose,
   125→    to,
   126→    asChild,
   127→    ...floatingProps
   128→  } = props
   129→
   130→  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false)
   131→  const { x, y, refs, strategy, isPositioned, elements, update } = useFloating({
   132→    middleware: floatingProps.middleware ?? [
   133→      flip({ padding: padding ?? 20 }),
   134→      offset(offsetValue ?? 10),
   135→      shift(),
   136→    ],
   137→
   138→    strategy: floatingProps.strategy,
   139→    placement: floatingProps.placement ?? 'bottom-start',
   140→    whileElementsMounted: floatingProps.whileElementsMounted,
   141→  })
   142→
   143→  useEffect(() => {
   144→    if (open && elements.reference && elements.floating) {
   145→      const cleanup = autoUpdate(elements.reference, elements.floating, update)
   146→      return cleanup
   147→    }
   148→  }, [open, elements, update])
   149→
   150→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
   151→
   152→  useClickAway(containerRef, () => {
   153→    if (trigger == 'click' || trigger == 'both') {
   154→      doPopoverDisappear()
   155→    }
   156→  })
   157→
   158→  const doPopoverDisappear = useCallback(() => {
   159→    if (debug) {
   160→      return
   161→    }
   162→    setOpen(false)
   163→  }, [debug])
   164→
   165→  const doPopoverShow = useEventCallback(() => {
   166→    if (isDisabled) return
   167→    setOpen(true)
   168→  })
   169→
   170→  const handleMouseOut = useCallback(() => {
   171→    doPopoverDisappear()
   172→  }, [doPopoverDisappear])
   173→
   174→  const listener = useMemo(() => {
   175→    const baseListener = {
   176→      // onFocus: doPopoverShow,
   177→      // onBlur: doPopoverDisappear,
   178→    }
   179→    switch (trigger) {
   180→      case 'click': {
   181→        return {
   182→          ...baseListener,
   183→          onClick: doPopoverShow,
   184→        }
   185→      }
   186→      case 'hover': {
   187→        return {
   188→          ...baseListener,
   189→          onMouseOver: doPopoverShow,
   190→          onMouseOut: doPopoverDisappear,
   191→        }
   192→      }
   193→      case 'both': {
   194→        return {
   195→          ...baseListener,
   196→          onClick: doPopoverShow,
   197→          onMouseOver: doPopoverShow,
   198→          onMouseOut: handleMouseOut,
   199→        }
   200→      }
   201→    }
   202→  }, [doPopoverDisappear, doPopoverShow, handleMouseOut, trigger])
   203→
   204→  const Child = triggerElement ? (
   205→    triggerElement
   206→  ) : TriggerComponent ? (
   207→    React.cloneElement(
   208→      createElement(TriggerComponent as any, triggerComponentProps),
   209→
   210→      {
   211→        tabIndex: 0,
   212→      },
   213→    )
   214→  ) : (
   215→    <></>
   216→  )
   217→  const TriggerWrapper = asChild ? (
   218→    React.cloneElement(
   219→      typeof Child === 'string' ? <span>{Child}</span> : Child,
   220→      {
   221→        ...listener,
   222→        ref: refs.setReference,
   223→      },
   224→    )
   225→  ) : (
   226→    <As
   227→      // @ts-ignore
   228→      role={trigger === 'both' || trigger === 'click' ? 'button' : 'note'}
   229→      className={clsxm('inline-block', wrapperClassNames)}
   230→      ref={refs.setReference}
   231→      {...listener}
   232→    >
   233→      {Child}
   234→    </As>
   235→  )
   236→
   237→  useEffect(() => {
   238→    if (refs.floating.current && open && type === 'popover') {
   239→      refs.floating.current.focus()
   240→    }
   241→  }, [open])
   242→
   243→  useEffect(() => {
   244→    if (open) {
   245→      onOpen?.()
   246→    } else {
   247→      onClose?.()
   248→    }
   249→  }, [open])
   250→  const actionCtxValue = useMemo(
   251→    () => ({ close: doPopoverDisappear }),
   252→    [doPopoverDisappear],
   253→  )
   254→
   255→  if (!props.children) {
   256→    return TriggerWrapper
   257→  }
   258→
   259→  return (
   260→    <>
   261→      {TriggerWrapper}
   262→
   263→      <AnimatePresence>
   264→        {open && (
   265→          <RootPortal to={to}>
   266→            <m.div
   267→              onWheel={stopPropagation}
   268→              className={clsxm(
   269→                'float-popover',
   270→                'pointer-events-auto relative z-[99]',
   271→                popoverWrapperClassNames,
   272→              )}
   273→              {...(trigger === 'hover' || trigger === 'both' ? listener : {})}
   274→              ref={containerRef}
   275→            >
   276→              <m.div
   277→                tabIndex={-1}
   278→                role={type === 'tooltip' ? 'tooltip' : 'dialog'}
   279→                className={clsxm(
   280→                  !headless && [
   281→                    'rounded-xl border border-zinc-400/20 p-4 outline-hidden backdrop-blur-lg dark:border-zinc-500/30',
   282→                    'bg-white/80 dark:bg-neutral-900/80',
   283→                  ],
   284→
   285→                  'shadow-perfect relative z-[2]',
   286→
   287→                  type === 'tooltip'
   288→                    ? `max-w-[25rem] break-all rounded-xl px-4 py-2`
   289→                    : '',
   290→
   291→                  popoverClassNames,
   292→                )}
   293→                ref={refs.setFloating}
   294→                initial={{ y: '10px', opacity: 0 }}
   295→                animate={{ y: '0px', opacity: 1 }}
   296→                exit={{
   297→                  y: '10px',
   298→                  opacity: 0,
   299→                  transition: { type: 'tween', duration: 0.2 },
   300→                }}
   301→                transition={microReboundPreset}
   302→                style={{
   303→                  position: strategy,
   304→                  top: y ?? '',
   305→                  left: x ?? '',
   306→                  visibility: isPositioned && x !== null ? 'visible' : 'hidden',
   307→                }}
   308→              >
   309→                <PopoverActionContext value={actionCtxValue}>
   310→                  {props.children}
   311→                </PopoverActionContext>
   312→              </m.div>
   313→            </m.div>
   314→          </RootPortal>
   315→        )}
   316→      </AnimatePresence>
   317→    </>
   318→  )
   319→}
   320→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  ElementNode,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  RangeSelection,
     6→} from 'lexical'
     7→import {
     8→  $getRoot,
     9→  $getSelection,
    10→  $getState,
    11→  $isElementNode,
    12→  $isLineBreakNode,
    13→  $isRangeSelection,
    14→  $isTextNode,
    15→} from 'lexical'
    16→
    17→import { blockIdState } from '../plugins/BlockIdPlugin'
    18→
    19→export interface BlockAnchor {
    20→  mode: 'block'
    21→  blockId: string
    22→  blockType: string
    23→  blockFingerprint: string
    24→  snapshotText: string
    25→}
    26→
    27→export interface RangeAnchor {
    28→  mode: 'range'
    29→  blockId: string
    30→  blockType: string
    31→  blockFingerprint: string
    32→  snapshotText: string
    33→  quote: string
    34→  prefix: string
    35→  suffix: string
    36→  startOffset: number
    37→  endOffset: number
    38→}
    39→
    40→export type CommentAnchor = BlockAnchor | RangeAnchor
    41→
    42→export type AnchorError =
    43→  | 'no-selection'
    44→  | 'cross-block'
    45→  | 'collapsed'
    46→  | 'no-block-id'
    47→  | 'not-root-block'
    48→
    49→export type AnchorResult<T> =
    50→  | { ok: true; anchor: T }
    51→  | { ok: false; error: AnchorError }
    52→
    53→function computeBlockFingerprint(block: ElementNode): string {
    54→  const text = block.getTextContent()
    55→  const input = text.slice(0, 200) + String(text.length)
    56→  let hash = 5381
    57→  for (let i = 0; i < input.length; i++) {
    58→    hash = ((hash << 5) + hash + (input.codePointAt(i) ?? 0)) | 0
    59→  }
    60→  return (hash >>> 0).toString(16)
    61→}
    62→
    63→function $getRootBlock(node: LexicalNode): ElementNode | null {
    64→  const root = $getRoot()
    65→  let current: LexicalNode | null = node
    66→  while (current) {
    67→    const parent: ElementNode | null = current.getParent()
    68→    if (parent === root && 'getChildren' in current) {
    69→      return current as ElementNode
    70→    }
    71→    current = parent
    72→  }
    73→  return null
    74→}
    75→
    76→function $resolveSelectionPoint(
    77→  selection: RangeSelection,
    78→  which: 'anchor' | 'focus',
    79→): { node: LexicalNode; offset: number } {
    80→  const point = selection[which]
    81→  const node = point.getNode()
    82→
    83→  if ($isElementNode(node)) {
    84→    const children = node.getChildren()
    85→    if (point.offset < children.length) {
    86→      return { node: children[point.offset], offset: 0 }
    87→    }
    88→    const last = children.at(-1)
    89→    if (last && $isTextNode(last)) {
    90→      return { node: last, offset: last.getTextContentSize() }
    91→    }
    92→    return { node, offset: 0 }
    93→  }
    94→
    95→  return { node, offset: point.offset }
    96→}
    97→
    98→function $getTextOffsetInBlock(
    99→  block: ElementNode,
   100→  targetNode: LexicalNode,
   101→  targetOffset: number,
   102→): number {
   103→  let offset = 0
   104→
   105→  function walk(node: LexicalNode): boolean {
   106→    if (node.is(targetNode)) {
   107→      offset += targetOffset
   108→      return true
   109→    }
   110→    if ($isTextNode(node)) {
   111→      offset += node.getTextContentSize()
   112→    } else if ($isLineBreakNode(node)) {
   113→      offset += 1
   114→    } else if ($isElementNode(node)) {
   115→      for (const child of node.getChildren()) {
   116→        if (walk(child)) return true
   117→      }
   118→    }
   119→    return false
   120→  }
   121→
   122→  for (const child of block.getChildren()) {
   123→    if (walk(child)) break
   124→  }
   125→
   126→  return offset
   127→}
   128→
   129→function $buildBlockAnchorData(block: ElementNode): AnchorResult<BlockAnchor> {
   130→  const blockId = $getState(block, blockIdState)
   131→  if (!blockId) {
   132→    return { ok: false, error: 'no-block-id' }
   133→  }
   134→
   135→  return {
   136→    ok: true,
   137→    anchor: {
   138→      mode: 'block',
   139→      blockId,
   140→      blockType: block.getType(),
   141→      blockFingerprint: computeBlockFingerprint(block),
   142→      snapshotText: block.getTextContent().slice(0, 300),
   143→    },
   144→  }
   145→}
   146→
   147→export function buildBlockAnchor(
   148→  editor: LexicalEditor,
   149→  blockKey?: string,
   150→): AnchorResult<BlockAnchor> {
   151→  return editor.read(() => {
   152→    if (blockKey) {
   153→      const node = $getRoot()
   154→        .getChildren()
   155→        .find((c) => c.getKey() === blockKey)
   156→      if (!node || !('getChildren' in node)) {
   157→        return { ok: false, error: 'not-root-block' }
   158→      }
   159→      return $buildBlockAnchorData(node as ElementNode)
   160→    }
   161→
   162→    const selection = $getSelection()
   163→    if (!$isRangeSelection(selection)) {
   164→      return { ok: false, error: 'no-selection' }
   165→    }
   166→
   167→    const anchorNode = selection.anchor.getNode()
   168→    const block = $getRootBlock(anchorNode)
   169→    if (!block) {
   170→      return { ok: false, error: 'not-root-block' }
   171→    }
   172→
   173→    return $buildBlockAnchorData(block)
   174→  })
   175→}
   176→
   177→export function buildRangeAnchor(
   178→  editor: LexicalEditor,
   179→): AnchorResult<RangeAnchor> {
   180→  return editor.read(() => {
   181→    const selection = $getSelection()
   182→    if (!$isRangeSelection(selection)) {
   183→      return { ok: false, error: 'no-selection' }
   184→    }
   185→
   186→    if (selection.isCollapsed()) {
   187→      return { ok: false, error: 'collapsed' }
   188→    }
   189→
   190→    const anchorBlock = $getRootBlock(selection.anchor.getNode())
   191→    const focusBlock = $getRootBlock(selection.focus.getNode())
   192→
   193→    if (!anchorBlock || !focusBlock) {
   194→      return { ok: false, error: 'not-root-block' }
   195→    }
   196→
   197→    if (anchorBlock !== focusBlock) {
   198→      return { ok: false, error: 'cross-block' }
   199→    }
   200→
   201→    const block = anchorBlock
   202→    const blockId = $getState(block, blockIdState)
   203→    if (!blockId) {
   204→      return { ok: false, error: 'no-block-id' }
   205→    }
   206→
   207→    const anchorPoint = $resolveSelectionPoint(selection, 'anchor')
   208→    const focusPoint = $resolveSelectionPoint(selection, 'focus')
   209→
   210→    let startOffset = $getTextOffsetInBlock(
   211→      block,
   212→      anchorPoint.node,
   213→      anchorPoint.offset,
   214→    )
   215→    let endOffset = $getTextOffsetInBlock(
   216→      block,
   217→      focusPoint.node,
   218→      focusPoint.offset,
   219→    )
   220→
   221→    if (startOffset > endOffset) {
   222→      ;[startOffset, endOffset] = [endOffset, startOffset]
   223→    }
   224→
   225→    const text = block.getTextContent()
   226→    const quote = text.slice(startOffset, endOffset)
   227→    const prefix = text.slice(Math.max(0, startOffset - 50), startOffset)
   228→    const suffix = text.slice(endOffset, endOffset + 50)
   229→
   230→    return {
   231→      ok: true,
   232→      anchor: {
   233→        mode: 'range',
   234→        blockId,
   235→        blockType: block.getType(),
   236→        blockFingerprint: computeBlockFingerprint(block),
   237→        snapshotText: text.slice(0, 300),
   238→        quote,
   239→        prefix,
   240→        suffix,
   241→        startOffset,
   242→        endOffset,
   243→      },
   244→    }
   245→  })
   246→}
   247→
```

 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentAnchorHighlight.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type { CommentModel } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     4→import { useEffect } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import type { BlockInfo } from './anchor-utils'
     7→import type { CommentAnchor, RangeAnchor } from './types'
     8→
     9→type CommentWithAnchor = CommentModel & { anchor?: CommentAnchor }
    10→
    11→function collectRangeAnchors(comments: CommentWithAnchor[]): RangeAnchor[] {
    12→  const result: RangeAnchor[] = []
    13→  for (const c of comments) {
    14→    if (c.anchor?.mode === 'range') result.push(c.anchor)
    15→    if (c.children) {
    16→      result.push(...collectRangeAnchors(c.children as CommentWithAnchor[]))
    17→    }
    18→  }
    19→  return result
    20→}
    21→
    22→function findBlockElement(
    23→  contentEl: Element,
    24→  blockInfos: BlockInfo[],
    25→  blockId: string,
    26→): Element | null {
    27→  const idx = blockInfos.findIndex((b) => b.blockId === blockId)
    28→  if (idx === -1) return null
    29→  return contentEl.children[idx] ?? null
    30→}
    31→
    32→function createDomRange(
    33→  blockEl: Element,
    34→  startOffset: number,
    35→  endOffset: number,
    36→): Range | null {
    37→  const walker = document.createTreeWalker(
    38→    blockEl,
    39→    NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT | NodeFilter.SHOW_ELEMENT,
    40→    {
    41→      acceptNode(node) {
    42→        if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT
    43→        if (node instanceof HTMLBRElement) return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT
    44→        return NodeFilter.FILTER_SKIP
    45→      },
    46→    },
    47→  )
    48→  let offset = 0
    49→  let startNode: Text | null = null
    50→  let startNodeOffset = 0
    51→  let endNode: Text | null = null
    52→  let endNodeOffset = 0
    53→  let node: Node | null
    54→
    55→  while ((node = walker.nextNode())) {
    56→    const len = node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE ? (node as Text).length : 1
    57→
    58→    if (
    59→      !startNode &&
    60→      node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE &&
    61→      offset + len >= startOffset
    62→    ) {
    63→      startNode = node as Text
    64→      startNodeOffset = startOffset - offset
    65→    }
    66→    if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE && offset + len >= endOffset) {
    67→      endNode = node as Text
    68→      endNodeOffset = endOffset - offset
    69→      break
    70→    }
    71→    offset += len
    72→  }
    73→
    74→  if (!startNode || !endNode) return null
    75→
    76→  try {
    77→    const range = document.createRange()
    78→    range.setStart(startNode, startNodeOffset)
    79→    range.setEnd(endNode, endNodeOffset)
    80→    return range
    81→  } catch {
    82→    return null
    83→  }
    84→}
    85→
    86→const HIGHLIGHT_STYLE_ID = 'comment-anchor-highlight-style'
    87→
    88→function ensureHighlightStyle() {
    89→  if (document.getElementById(HIGHLIGHT_STYLE_ID)) return
    90→  const style = document.createElement('style')
    91→  style.id = HIGHLIGHT_STYLE_ID
    92→  style.textContent = [
    93→    '::highlight(comment-highlight) {',
    94→    '  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-accent, #33a6b8) 15%, transparent);',
    95→    '  text-decoration: underline;',
    96→    '  text-decoration-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-accent, #33a6b8) 50%, transparent);',
    97→    '  text-underline-offset: 2px;',
    98→    '}',
    99→  ].join('\n')
   100→  document.head.append(style)
   101→}
   102→
   103→export function CommentAnchorHighlight({
   104→  containerRef,
   105→  blockInfos,
   106→  comments,
   107→}: {
   108→  containerRef: React.RefObject<HTMLElement | null>
   109→  blockInfos: BlockInfo[]
   110→  comments: CommentWithAnchor[]
   111→}) {
   112→  useEffect(() => {
   113→    if (
   114→      typeof CSS === 'undefined' ||
   115→      !('highlights' in CSS) ||
   116→      typeof (window as any).Highlight !== 'function'
   117→    )
   118→      return
   119→    if (!containerRef.current) return
   120→
   121→    const contentEl = containerRef.current.querySelector('.rich-content')
   122→    if (!contentEl) return
   123→
   124→    const rangeAnchors = collectRangeAnchors(comments)
   125→    if (rangeAnchors.length === 0) {
   126→      ;(CSS as any).highlights.delete('comment-highlight')
   127→      return
   128→    }
   129→
   130→    ensureHighlightStyle()
   131→
   132→    const ranges: Range[] = []
   133→    for (const anchor of rangeAnchors) {
   134→      const blockEl = findBlockElement(contentEl, blockInfos, anchor.blockId)
   135→      if (!blockEl) continue
   136→
   137→      const range = createDomRange(
   138→        blockEl,
   139→        anchor.startOffset,
   140→        anchor.endOffset,
   141→      )
   142→      if (range) ranges.push(range)
   143→    }
   144→
   145→    if (ranges.length > 0) {
   146→      const highlight = new (window as any).Highlight(...ranges)
   147→      ;(CSS as any).highlights.set('comment-highlight', highlight)
   148→    } else {
   149→      ;(CSS as any).highlights.delete('comment-highlight')
   150→    }
   151→
   152→    return () => {
   153→      ;(CSS as any).highlights.delete('comment-highlight')
   154→    }
   155→  }, [containerRef, blockInfos, comments])
   156→
   157→  return null
   158→}
   159→
```

```text
    24→function AvatarStack({

    53→          radius="full"

   116→  blockIndex: number
   117→  blockComments: CommentWithAnchor[]
   118→  blockInfos: BlockInfo[]
   119→  refId: string
   120→  top: number
   121→  onOpen: () => void
   122→  onClose: () => void
   123→}) {
   124→  const anchor = buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(blockInfos, blockIndex)
   125→
   126→  if (!anchor) return null
   127→
   128→  return (
   129→    <div
   130→      className="absolute -right-1 flex items-start"
   131→      style={{ top: `${top}px` }}
   132→    >
   133→      <PresentSheet
   134→        triggerAsChild
   135→        title="评论"
   136→        content={
   137→          <CommentBlockThread
   138→            comments={blockComments}
   139→            refId={refId}
   140→            anchor={anchor!}
   141→          />
   142→        }
   143→        onOpenChange={(open) => {
   144→          if (open) onOpen()
   145→          else onClose()
   146→        }}
   147→      >
   148→        <button
   149→          type="button"
   150→          className="flex cursor-pointer items-center gap-0.5 rounded-full border border-zinc-200/80 bg-white/90 py-0.5 pl-0.5 pr-1.5 shadow-sm backdrop-blur-sm dark:border-zinc-700/80 dark:bg-zinc-900/90"
   151→        >
   152→          <AvatarStack comments={blockComments} size={20} />
   153→          <span className="text-[10px] font-medium text-muted-foreground">
   154→            {blockComments.length}
   155→          </span>
   156→        </button>
   157→      </PresentSheet>
   158→    </div>
   159→  )
   160→}
   161→
   162→interface ActivePanel {
   163→  blockIndex: number
   164→  blockId: string
   165→}
   166→
   167→export function CommentBlockGutter({
   168→  containerRef,
   169→  blockInfos,
   170→  comments,
   171→  refId,
   172→}: CommentBlockGutterProps) {
   173→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
   174→
   175→  const commentsByBlock = useMemo(() => {
   176→    const map = new Map<string, CommentWithAnchor[]>()
   177→    for (const c of comments) {
   178→      const blockId = c.anchor?.blockId
   179→      if (blockId) {
   180→        const arr = map.get(blockId) || []
   181→        arr.push(c)
   182→        map.set(blockId, arr)
   183→      }
   184→    }
   185→    return map
   186→  }, [comments])
   187→
   188→  const [blockPositions, setBlockPositions] = useState<Map<number, number>>(
   189→    () => new Map(),
   190→  )
   191→
   192→  useEffect(() => {
   193→    const container = containerRef.current
   194→    if (!container) return
   195→    const contentEl = container.querySelector('.rich-content')
   196→    if (!contentEl) return
   197→
   198→    const updatePositions = () => {
   199→      const containerRect = container.getBoundingClientRect()
   200→      const positions = new Map<number, number>()
   201→      for (let i = 0; i < contentEl.children.length; i++) {
   202→        const child = contentEl.children[i] as HTMLElement
   203→        const rect = child.getBoundingClientRect()
   204→        positions.set(i, rect.top - containerRect.top)
   205→      }
   206→      setBlockPositions(new Map(positions))
   207→    }
   208→
   209→    updatePositions()
   210→    const observer = new ResizeObserver(updatePositions)
   211→    observer.observe(contentEl)
   212→
   213→    return () => observer.disconnect()
   214→  }, [containerRef, blockInfos])
   215→
   216→  const [hoverIndex, setHoverIndex] = useState(-1)
   217→
   218→  const handleMouseMove = useCallback(
   219→    (e: MouseEvent) => {
   220→      const container = containerRef.current
   221→      if (!container) return
   222→      const contentEl = container.querySelector('.rich-content')
   223→      if (!contentEl) return
   224→
   225→      for (let i = 0; i < contentEl.children.length; i++) {
   226→        const child = contentEl.children[i] as HTMLElement
   227→        const rect = child.getBoundingClientRect()
   228→        if (e.clientY >= rect.top && e.clientY < rect.bottom) {
   229→          setHoverIndex(i)
   230→          return
   231→        }
   232→      }
   233→      setHoverIndex(-1)
   234→    },
   235→    [containerRef],
   236→  )
   237→
   238→  const handleMouseLeave = useCallback(() => {
   239→    setHoverIndex(-1)
   240→  }, [])
   241→
   242→  useEffect(() => {
   243→    if (isMobile) return
   244→
   245→    const container = containerRef.current
   246→    if (!container) return
   247→
   248→    container.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
   249→    container.addEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
   250→    return () => {
   251→      container.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
   252→      container.removeEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
   253→    }
   254→  }, [containerRef, handleMouseMove, handleMouseLeave, isMobile])
   255→
   256→  // Panel state — decoupled from gutter items
   257→  const [activePanel, setActivePanel] = useState<ActivePanel | null>(null)
   258→  const prevActiveRef = useRef<string | null>(null)
   259→  const panelRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
   260→  const gutterRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
   261→
   262→  const activeBlockId = activePanel?.blockId ?? null
   263→
   264→  const resolveBlockIndex = useCallback(
   265→    (id: string | null): number => {
   266→      if (!id) return -1
   267→      const idx = blockInfos.findIndex((b) => b.blockId === id)
   268→      if (idx !== -1) return idx
   269→      if (id.startsWith('__idx_')) {
   270→        return Number.parseInt(id.slice(6), 10)
   271→      }
   272→      return -1
   273→    },
   274→    [blockInfos],
   275→  )
   276→
   277→  // Block highlight
   278→  useEffect(() => {
   279→    const container = containerRef.current
   280→    if (!container) return
   281→    const contentEl = container.querySelector('.rich-content')
   282→    if (!contentEl) return
   283→
   284→    const prevIdx = resolveBlockIndex(prevActiveRef.current)
   285→    if (prevIdx !== -1) {
   286→      contentEl.children[prevIdx]?.classList.remove('comment-block-active')
   287→    }
   288→
   289→    const idx = resolveBlockIndex(activeBlockId)
   290→    if (idx !== -1) {
   291→      contentEl.children[idx]?.classList.add('comment-block-active')
   292→    }
   293→
   294→    prevActiveRef.current = activeBlockId
   295→  }, [activeBlockId, containerRef, resolveBlockIndex])
   296→
   297→  useEffect(() => {
   298→    const container = containerRef.current
   299→    return () => {
   300→      if (!container) return
   301→      const contentEl = container.querySelector('.rich-content')
   302→      if (!contentEl) return
   303→      for (const child of contentEl.children) {
   304→        child.classList.remove('comment-block-active')
   305→      }
   306→    }
   307→  }, [containerRef])
   308→
   309→  // Click outside panel to close
   310→  useEffect(() => {
   311→    if (!activePanel) return
   312→    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {
   313→      const target = e.target as Node
   314→      if (panelRef.current?.contains(target)) return
   315→      if (gutterRef.current?.contains(target)) return
   316→      setActivePanel(null)
   317→    }
   318→    const rafId = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   319→      document.addEventListener('mousedown', handler)
   320→    })
   321→    return () => {
   322→      cancelAnimationFrame(rafId)
   323→      document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handler)
   324→    }
   325→  }, [activePanel])
   326→
   327→  // Escape to close
   328→  useEffect(() => {
   329→    if (!activePanel) return
   330→    const handler = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
   331→      if (e.key === 'Escape') setActivePanel(null)
   332→    }
   333→    document.addEventListener('keydown', handler)
   334→    return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handler)
   335→  }, [activePanel])
   336→
   337→  const handleGutterClick = useCallback(
   338→    (blockIndex: number, blockId: string) => {
   339→      const anchor = buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(blockInfos, blockIndex)
   340→      if (!anchor) return
   341→      setActivePanel((prev) =>
   342→        prev?.blockId === blockId ? null : { blockIndex, blockId },
   343→      )
   344→    },
   345→    [blockInfos],
   346→  )
   347→
   348→  const gutterItems = useMemo(() => {
   349→    const items: {
   350→      blockIndex: number
   351→      blockId: string
   352→      comments: CommentWithAnchor[]
   353→      isGhost: boolean
   354→    }[] = []
   355→
   356→    for (const [blockId, blockComments] of commentsByBlock) {
   357→      const blockIdx = blockInfos.findIndex((b) => b.blockId === blockId)
   358→      if (blockIdx !== -1) {
   359→        items.push({
   360→          blockIndex: blockIdx,
   361→          blockId,
   362→          comments: blockComments,
   363→          isGhost: false,
   364→        })
   365→      }
   366→    }
   367→
   368→    if (!isMobile && hoverIndex !== -1) {
   369→      const info = blockInfos[hoverIndex]
   370→      if (info && !commentsByBlock.has(info.blockId || `__idx_${hoverIndex}`)) {
   371→        items.push({
   372→          blockIndex: hoverIndex,
   373→          blockId: info.blockId || `__idx_${hoverIndex}`,
   374→          comments: [],
   375→          isGhost: true,
   376→        })
   377→      }
   378→    }
   379→
   380→    return items
   381→  }, [commentsByBlock, blockInfos, hoverIndex, isMobile])
   382→
   383→  // Mobile: only show blocks with comments
   384→  if (isMobile) {
   385→    const commentItems = gutterItems.filter((item) => !item.isGhost)
   386→    if (commentItems.length === 0) return null
   387→
   388→    return (
   389→      <div className="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none">
   390→        {commentItems.map((item) => {
   391→          const top = blockPositions.get(item.blockIndex)
   392→          if (top === undefined) return null
   393→
   394→          return (
   395→            <div key={item.blockId} className="pointer-events-auto">
   396→              <MobileGutterItem
   397→                blockIndex={item.blockIndex}
   398→                blockComments={item.comments}
   399→                blockInfos={blockInfos}
   400→                refId={refId}
   401→                top={top}
   402→                onOpen={() =>
   403→                  setActivePanel({
   404→                    blockIndex: item.blockIndex,
   405→                    blockId: item.blockId,
   406→                  })
   407→                }
   408→                onClose={() => setActivePanel(null)}
   409→              />
   410→            </div>
   411→          )
   412→        })}
   413→      </div>
   414→    )
   415→  }
   416→
   417→  const panelTop = activePanel
   418→    ? blockPositions.get(activePanel.blockIndex)
   419→    : undefined
   420→  const panelAnchor = activePanel
   421→    ? buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(blockInfos, activePanel.blockIndex)
   422→    : null
   423→  const panelComments = activePanel
   424→    ? commentsByBlock.get(activePanel.blockId) || []
   425→    : []
   426→
   427→  return (
   428→    <div
   429→      ref={gutterRef}
   430→      className="absolute top-0 bottom-0 right-0 hidden w-8 lg:block z-10"
   431→    >
   432→      {gutterItems.map((item) => {
   433→        const top = blockPositions.get(item.blockIndex)
   434→        if (top === undefined) return null
   435→
   436→        return (
   437→          <DesktopGutterTrigger
   438→            key={item.blockId}
   439→            blockComments={item.comments}
   440→            top={top}
   441→            isHovered={hoverIndex === item.blockIndex}
   442→            isActive={activeBlockId === item.blockId}
   443→            onClick={() => handleGutterClick(item.blockIndex, item.blockId)}
   444→          />
   445→        )
   446→      })}
   447→
   448→      {activePanel && panelAnchor && panelTop !== undefined && (
   449→        <div
   450→          ref={panelRef}
   451→          className="absolute left-full ml-2 z-20 rounded-xl border border-zinc-200/80 bg-white shadow-lg overflow-hidden dark:border-zinc-700/80 dark:bg-zinc-900"
   452→          style={{ top: `${panelTop}px` }}
   453→        >
   454→          <CommentBlockThread
   455→            comments={panelComments}
   456→            refId={refId}
   457→            anchor={panelAnchor}
   458→            onClose={() => setActivePanel(null)}
   459→          />
   460→        </div>
   461→      )}
   462→    </div>
   463→  )
   464→}
   465→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     9→
    10→import { CommentBoxRoot } from './CommentBox/Root'
    11→import type { CommentAnchor } from './types'
    12→
    13→type CommentWithAnchor = CommentModel & { anchor?: CommentAnchor }
    14→
    15→interface CommentBlockThreadProps {
    16→  comments: CommentWithAnchor[]
    17→  refId: string
    18→  anchor: CommentAnchor
    19→  onClose?: () => void
    20→}
    21→
    22→function ThreadComment({ comment }: { comment: CommentWithAnchor }) {
    23→  const { avatar, author } = comment
    24→
    25→  return (
    26→    <div className="flex gap-2 px-3 py-2">
    27→      <Avatar
    28→        shadow={false}
    29→        imageUrl={avatar}
    30→        text={author}
    31→        size={24}
    32→        radius="full"
    33→        className="shrink-0 rounded-full"
    34→      />
    35→      <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
    36→        <div className="flex items-baseline gap-1.5">
    37→          <span className="text-[13px] font-semibold text-foreground/90">
    38→            {author}
    39→          </span>
    40→          <span className="text-[11px] text-muted-foreground">
    41→            <RelativeTime date={comment.created} />
    42→          </span>
    43→        </div>
    44→        {comment.anchor?.mode === 'range' && (
    45→          <div className="mt-0.5 border-l-2 border-accent/40 pl-2 text-xs italic text-muted-foreground">
    46→            {comment.anchor.quote}
    47→          </div>
    48→        )}
    49→        <p className="mt-0.5 text-[13px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/80">
    50→          {comment.text}
    51→        </p>
    52→      </div>
    53→    </div>
    54→  )
    55→}
    56→
    57→export function CommentBlockThread({
    58→  comments,
    59→  refId,
    60→  anchor,
    61→  onClose,
    62→}: CommentBlockThreadProps) {
    63→  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
    64→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    65→
    66→  useEffect(() => {
    67→    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
    68→      const el = containerRef.current?.querySelector<HTMLElement>(
    69→        '[contenteditable="true"]',
    70→      )
    71→      el?.focus()
    72→    }, 50)
    73→    return () => clearTimeout(timer)
    74→  }, [anchor])
    75→
    76→  const handleAfterSubmit = useCallback(() => {
    77→    queryClient.invalidateQueries({
    78→      queryKey: ['comments', refId, 'anchors'],
    79→    })
    80→    onClose?.()
    81→  }, [queryClient, refId, onClose])
    82→
    83→  return (
    84→    <div ref={containerRef} className="w-[400px] min-w-0 overflow-hidden">
    85→      {comments.length > 0 && (
    86→        <div className="max-h-80 overflow-y-auto py-1">
    87→          {comments.map((comment) => (
    88→            <ThreadComment key={comment.id} comment={comment} />
    89→          ))}
    90→        </div>
    91→      )}
    92→      <div className={comments.length > 0 ? 'border-t border-border/50' : ''}>
    93→        <CommentBoxRoot
    94→          refId={refId}
    95→          anchor={anchor}
    96→          afterSubmit={handleAfterSubmit}
    97→          compact
    98→          className="px-3 py-2.5"
    99→        />
   100→      </div>
   101→    </div>
   102→  )
   103→}
   104→
```

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type { CommentModel, PaginateResult } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     4→import type { InfiniteData } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     5→import { useQuery, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     6→import type { PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
     7→import { useMemo, useRef, useSyncExternalStore } from 'react'
     8→
     9→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
    10→import { buildCommentsQueryKey } from '~/queries/keys'
    11→
    12→import type { BlockInfo } from './anchor-utils'
    13→import { extractBlockInfos } from './anchor-utils'
    14→import { CommentAnchorHighlight } from './CommentAnchorHighlight'
    15→import { CommentBlockGutter } from './CommentBlockGutter'
    16→import type { CommentAnchor } from './types'
    17→
    18→type CommentWithAnchor = CommentModel & { anchor?: CommentAnchor }
    19→type CommentsQueryData = InfiniteData<
    20→  PaginateResult<CommentWithAnchor & { ref: string }>
    21→>
    22→
    23→function useAnchorCommentsQuery(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
    24→  const { data } = useQuery({
    25→    queryKey: ['comments', refId, 'anchors'],
    26→    queryFn: async () => {
    27→      const data = await apiClient.comment.proxy
    28→        .ref(refId)
    29→        .get<PaginateResult<CommentWithAnchor & { ref: string }>>({
    30→          params: { hasAnchor: 'true', size: 50 },
    31→        })
    32→
    33→      return data
    34→    },
    35→  })
    36→
    37→  return useMemo(() => {
    38→    if (!data) return []
    39→    return data.data
    40→  }, [data])
    41→}
    42→
    43→function useCachedCommentsData(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
    44→  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
    45→  const queryKey = useMemo(() => buildCommentsQueryKey(refId), [refId])
    46→  const queryCache = queryClient.getQueryCache()
    47→
    48→  const data = useSyncExternalStore(
    49→    (onStoreChange) => {
    50→      const unsubscribe = queryCache.subscribe((event) => {
    51→        if (
    52→          event.type === 'updated' &&
    53→          event.query.queryHash === JSON.stringify(queryKey)
    54→        ) {
    55→          onStoreChange()
    56→        }
    57→      })
    58→      return unsubscribe
    59→    },
    60→    () => queryClient.getQueryData<CommentsQueryData>(queryKey),
    61→    () => null as CommentsQueryData | null,
    62→  )
    63→
    64→  return useMemo(() => {
    65→    if (!data) return []
    66→    return data.pages.flatMap((page) => page.data)
    67→  }, [data])
    68→}
    69→
    70→function useMergedAnchorComments(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
    71→  const eagerComments = useAnchorCommentsQuery(refId)
    72→  const cachedComments = useCachedCommentsData(refId)
    73→
    74→  return useMemo(() => {
    75→    const map = new Map<string, CommentWithAnchor>()
    76→    for (const c of eagerComments) map.set(c.id, c)
    77→    for (const c of cachedComments) {
    78→      if ((c as CommentWithAnchor).anchor) map.set(c.id, c)
    79→    }
    80→    return [...map.values()]
    81→  }, [eagerComments, cachedComments])
    82→}
    83→
    84→export function LexicalCommentWrapper({
    85→  content,
    86→  refId,
    87→  title: _title,
    88→  children,
    89→}: PropsWithChildren<{
    90→  content: string
    91→  refId: string
    92→  title: string
    93→}>) {
    94→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    95→  const blockInfos = useMemo<BlockInfo[]>(
    96→    () => extractBlockInfos(content),
    97→    [content],
    98→  )
    99→
   100→  const comments = useMergedAnchorComments(refId)
   101→
   102→  return (
   103→    <div ref={containerRef} className="group/comment-block relative lg:pr-8">
   104→      {children}
   105→      <CommentBlockGutter
   106→        containerRef={containerRef}
   107→        blockInfos={blockInfos}
   108→        comments={comments}
   109→        refId={refId}
   110→      />
   111→      <CommentAnchorHighlight
   112→        containerRef={containerRef}
   113→        blockInfos={blockInfos}
   114→        comments={comments}
   115→      />
   116→    </div>
   117→  )
   118→}
   119→
```

```text
    16→import { CommentBoxSignedOutContent } from './SignedOutContent'
    17→import { SwitchCommentMode } from './SwitchCommentMode'

    19→export const CommentBoxRoot: Component<CommentBaseProps> = (props) => {
    20→  const {
    21→    refId,
    22→    className,
    23→    afterSubmit,
    24→    initialValue,
    25→    autoFocus,
    26→    anchor,
    27→    compact,
    28→  } = props
    29→
    30→  const mode = useCommentMode()
    31→
    32→  const isLogged = useIsOwnerLogged()
    33→
    34→  const sessionReader = useSessionReader()
    35→
    36→  useEffect(() => {

    38→      setCommentMode(CommentBoxMode['with-auth'])

    51→          <div
    52→            className={clsxm('group relative w-full min-w-0', className)}
    53→            data-hide-print
    54→          >
    55→            {!compact && <SwitchCommentMode />}
    56→
    57→            <div className="relative w-full">
    58→              {isLogged ? (
    59→                <CommentBoxLegacy autoFocus={autoFocus} />
    60→              ) : mode === CommentBoxMode.legacy ? (
    61→                <CommentBoxLegacy autoFocus={autoFocus} />
    62→              ) : (
    63→                <CommentBoxWithAuth autoFocus={autoFocus} />
    64→              )}
    65→            </div>
    66→          </div>
    67→        </CommentBoxProvider>
    68→      </CommentCompactContext>
    69→    </ErrorBoundary>
    70→  )
    71→}
    72→
    73→const CommentBoxLegacy: Component<{ autoFocus?: boolean }> = ({
    74→  autoFocus,
    75→}) => (
    76→  <AutoResizeHeight>
    77→    <CommentBoxLegacyForm autoFocus={autoFocus} />
    78→  </AutoResizeHeight>
    79→)
    80→
    81→const CommentBoxWithAuth: Component<{ autoFocus?: boolean }> = ({
    82→  autoFocus,
    83→}) => {
    84→  const isReaderLogin = !!useSessionReader()
    85→
    86→  return (
    87→    <AutoResizeHeight>
    88→      {!isReaderLogin ? (
    89→        <CommentBoxSignedOutContent />
    90→      ) : (
    91→        <CommentBoxAuthedInput autoFocus={autoFocus} />
    92→      )}
    93→    </AutoResizeHeight>
    94→  )
    95→}
    96→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    34→  ),
    35→})
    36→export const CommentBoxContext = createContext<
    37→  ReturnType<typeof createInitialValue>
    38→>(null!)
    39→
    40→export const CommentBoxLifeCycleContext = createContext<{
    41→  afterSubmit?: () => void
    42→}>(null!)
    43→
    44→export const CommentBoxProvider = (
    45→  props: PropsWithChildren & {
    46→    refId: string
    47→    afterSubmit?: () => void

    50→  },

    53→
    54→  const ctxValue = useMemo(
    55→    () => ({
    56→      ...createInitialValue(),
    57→      refId: atom(refId),
    58→    }),
    59→    [refId],
    60→  )
    61→  useBeforeMounted(() => {
    62→    if (initialValue) {
    63→      jotaiStore.set(ctxValue.text, initialValue)
    64→    }
    65→    if (anchor) {
    66→      jotaiStore.set(ctxValue.anchor, anchor)
    67→    }
    68→  })
    69→  return (
    70→    <CommentBoxContext key={refId} value={ctxValue}>
    71→      <CommentBoxLifeCycleContext
    72→        value={useMemo(() => ({ afterSubmit }), [afterSubmit])}
    73→      >
    74→        {children}
    75→      </CommentBoxLifeCycleContext>
    76→    </CommentBoxContext>
    77→  )
    78→}
    79→

    81→
    82→export const CommentIsReplyContext = createContext(false)
    83→export const CommentOriginalRefIdContext = createContext('')
    84→export const CommentCompletedCallbackContext = createContext<

    87→export const CommentIsReplyProvider = (

    89→    isReply: boolean

    91→    onCompleted?: (comment: CommentModel) => void
    92→  }>,
    93→) => {
    94→  const { isReply, originalRefId, onCompleted, children } = props
    95→  return (
    96→    <CommentOriginalRefIdContext value={originalRefId}>
    97→      <CommentIsReplyContext value={isReply}>
    98→        <CommentCompletedCallbackContext value={onCompleted || null}>

   101→      </CommentIsReplyContext>
   102→    </CommentOriginalRefIdContext>

   105→

   116→
```

完美。现在总结一下所有发现。

吾已完成 Shiroi 注释模块之详细探索。以下为核心发现：

## 文件路径汇总

### 1. 类型定义
- `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/types.ts` — 导出 CommentAnchor、BlockAnchor、RangeAnchor
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/utils/comment-anchor.ts` — 源码型类定义（Lexical 编辑器侧）
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/dist/utils/comment-anchor.d.ts` — 类型声明（编译后）

### 2. 锚点工具
- `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/anchor-utils.ts` — 客户端锚点处理（BlockInfo、指纹计算、块查找）

### 3. 注释主体组件
- `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/Comments.tsx` — 列表入口（使用 useCommentsQuery）
- `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/Comment.tsx` — 单个注释渲染（支持 range/block 锚点显示）
- `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentProvider.tsx` — 数据提供者（CommentModel 管理）

### 4. 新增块级注释功能
- `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/LexicalCommentWrapper.tsx` — 整合锚点注释与富编辑器内容
- `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBlockGutter.tsx` — 左侧边栏（响应式桌面/手机UI）
- `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBlockThread.tsx` — 块级注释线程面板
- `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentAnchorHighlight.tsx` — CSS Highlights API 实现（高亮 range 锚点）

### 5. 注释输入框
- `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/Root.tsx` — CommentBox 入口
- `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/providers.tsx` — CommentBoxContext（含 anchor atom）

### 6. UI 组件
- `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/float-popover/FloatPopover.tsx` — Popover/Tooltip 实现（基于 @floating-ui）

---

## 类型定义详览

### CommentAnchor (联合类型)
```typescript
// 范围锚点（高亮特定文本）
interface RangeAnchor {
  mode: 'range'
  blockId: string
  blockType: string
  blockFingerprint: string
  snapshotText: string      // 整块文本前300字
  quote: string             // 被选中文本
  prefix: string            // 前50字上下文
  suffix: string            // 后50字上下文
  startOffset: number       // 块内文本偏移量
  endOffset: number
}

// 块锚点（评论整个块）
interface BlockAnchor {
  mode: 'block'
  blockId: string
  blockType: string
  blockFingerprint: string
  snapshotText: string      // 整块文本前300字
}
```

### BlockInfo (anchor-utils.ts)
```typescript
interface BlockInfo {
  index: number             // 在内容中的序号
  blockId: string           // Lexical 块 ID
  type: string              // 块类型（如 'paragraph'）
  textContent: string       // 完整文本内容
  fingerprint: string       // 指纹hash（前200字+长度）
}
```

### CommentModel (@mx-space/api-client@2.1.1)
```typescript
interface CommentModel extends BaseModel {
  refType: CollectionRefTypes   // 评论目标类型
  ref: string                   // 评论目标ID
  state: number                 // 审核状态
  commentsIndex: number
  author: string
  text: string
  mail?: string
  url?: string
  ip?: string
  agent?: string
  key: string                   // 昵称
  pin?: boolean                 // 置顶标志
  avatar: string
  parent?: CommentModel | string  // 父评论/ID
  children: CommentModel[]        // 子评论
  isWhispers?: boolean            // 私密评论
  location?: string               // IP 位置
  source?: string                 // 认证来源（如 'github'）
  readerId?: string               // 关联读者ID
  editedAt?: string               // 编辑时间
}
```

---

## 核心流程

### 1. 锚点创建（编辑器侧 - rich-editor）
```typescript
// buildBlockAnchor(editor, blockKey?) → AnchorResult<BlockAnchor>
// buildRangeAnchor(editor) → AnchorResult<RangeAnchor>
// 从 Lexical 选区导出锚点数据
```

### 2. 锚点解析（客户端侧 - web app）
```typescript
extractBlockInfos(content: string) // → BlockInfo[]
// JSON 解析编辑器状态，提取块结构
```

### 3. 注释渲染与交互
- **Comment.tsx** — 在注释显示中渲染锚点引用（range/block 模式）
- **CommentBlockGutter.tsx** — 在内容左侧显示块级注释指示器
  - 桌面：hover时显示按钮，点击展开右侧面板
  - 移动：始终显示，触发 PresentSheet
- **CommentAnchorHighlight.tsx** — 使用 CSS Highlights API 高亮 range 锚点

### 4. 注释输入框
- **CommentBoxRoot/providers.tsx** — 接收 `anchor` props，存储在 Jotai atom
- 提交时附带锚点数据到后端

---

## PopOver/Tooltip 组件

**FloatPopover** 特性：
- 基于 `@floating-ui/react-dom` 定位
- 触发模式：`hover` | `click` | `both`
- 类型：`tooltip` | `popover`
- 支持移动设备作 PresentSheet 降级
- 动画：microReboundPreset，entry opacity/y，exit tween
- 作用域：z-index 99，可自定义容器

---

## 滚动/焦点机制

**无现成的"滚动到评论"功能**，但基础架构已就位：

1. **块标识** — blockId 可用来定位 DOM 元素
2. **高亮机制** — CommentAnchorHighlight 使用 CSS Highlights API
3. **面板控制** — CommentBlockGutter 维持 activePanel 状态
4. **焦点** — CommentBlockThread 自动 focus() contenteditable 输入框

可扩展方向：
- 通过 blockId 查找 `.rich-content > :nth-child(blockIndex)` 并 `scrollIntoView()`
- 临时标记 `comment-block-active` 类（已支持）

```text
   198→                  'relative w-full min-w-0 justify-center',
   199→                  'mb-2 pl-7 md:pl-0',
   200→                )}
   201→              >
   202→                <span className="ml-2 flex grow flex-col flex-wrap items-start gap-0.5 md:flex-row md:items-center md:gap-2">
   203→                  {authorElement}
   204→                  <span className="-mt-1 flex min-w-0 shrink select-none flex-wrap items-center space-x-2 md:mt-0 md:self-end">
   205→                    <span className="inline-flex shrink-0 text-[0.71rem] font-medium opacity-40">
   206→                      <RelativeTime date={comment.created} />
   207→                    </span>
   208→                    <span className="break-all text-[0.71rem] opacity-30">
   209→                      {key}
   210→                    </span>
   211→                    {!!location && (
   212→                      <span className="min-w-0 max-w-full truncate break-all text-[0.71rem] opacity-35">
   213→                        来自：{location}
   214→                      </span>
   215→                    )}
   216→                    {!!isWhispers && <OcticonGistSecret />}
   217→                  </span>
   218→                </span>
   219→
   220→                <span className="shrink-0">
   221→                  <CommentPinButton comment={comment} />
   222→                </span>
   223→              </span>
   224→
   225→              {/* Content */}
   226→              {isSingleLinkContent ? (
   227→                <div className="relative inline-block">
   228→                  <BlockLinkRenderer
   229→                    href={text}
   230→                    accessory={
   231→                      <CommentActionButtonGroup
   232→                        commentId={comment.id}
   233→                        className="bottom-4"
   234→                      />
   235→                    }
   236→                    fallback={CommentNormalContent}
   237→                  />
   238→                </div>
   239→              ) : (
   240→                CommentNormalContent
   241→              )}
   242→            </div>
   243→          </div>
   244→        </m.li>
   245→
   246→        <CommentBoxHolderProvider />
   247→      </CommentHolderContext>
   248→      {comment.children && comment.children.length > 0 && (
   249→        <ul className="my-2 space-y-2">
   250→          {comment.children.map((child) => (
   251→            <Comment key={child.id} commentId={child.id} className="ml-9" />
   252→          ))}
   253→        </ul>
   254→      )}
   255→    </>
   256→  )
   257→}
   258→
   259→const CommentHolderContext = createContext(atom(null as null | HTMLDivElement))
   260→
   261→const CommentBoxHolderProvider = () => {
   262→  const ref = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
   263→  const commentBoxHolderElementAtom = use(CommentHolderContext)
   264→  useLayoutEffect(() => {
   265→    jotaiStore.set(commentBoxHolderElementAtom, ref.current)
   266→
   267→    return () => {
   268→      jotaiStore.set(commentBoxHolderElementAtom, null)
   269→    }
   270→  }, [commentBoxHolderElementAtom])
   271→  return <div ref={ref} />
   272→}
   273→
   274→export const CommentBoxHolderPortal = (props: PropsWithChildren) => {
   275→  const portalElement = useAtomValue(use(CommentHolderContext))
   276→
   277→  if (!portalElement) return null
   278→
   279→  return createPortal(props.children, portalElement)
   280→}
   281→
   282→const EditedCommentFooter: FC<{
   283→  commentId: string
   284→}> = ({ commentId }) => {
   285→  const editedAt = useCommentByIdSelector(
   286→    commentId,
   287→    useCallback((comment) => comment?.editedAt, []),
   288→  )
   289→  const ref = useCommentMarkdownContainerRef()
   290→
   291→  const lastNode = useMemo(() => {
   292→    if (!ref) return null
   293→    return ref.lastChild
   294→  }, [ref])
   295→  const lastNodeIsParagraph = useMemo(() => {
   296→    if (!lastNode) return false
   297→    return lastNode.nodeName === 'P'
   298→  }, [lastNode])
   299→
   300→  if (!editedAt) return null
   301→
   302→  const InlineEl = (
   303→    <FloatPopover
   304→      type="tooltip"
   305→      triggerElement={
   306→        <span className="ml-2 text-xs text-zinc-500">(已编辑)</span>
   307→      }
   308→    >
   309→      <div>
   310→        <span>编辑于</span>
   311→        <RelativeTime date={editedAt} />
   312→      </div>
   313→    </FloatPopover>
   314→  )
   315→  if (!lastNodeIsParagraph) return <div className="[&_*]:!ml-0">{InlineEl}</div>
   316→
   317→  return createPortal(InlineEl, lastNode as HTMLDivElement)
   318→}
   319→
```

 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/LexicalCommentWrapper.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type { CommentModel, PaginateResult } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     4→import type { InfiniteData } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     5→import { useQuery, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     6→import type { PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
     7→import { useMemo, useRef, useSyncExternalStore } from 'react'
     8→
     9→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
    10→import { buildCommentsQueryKey } from '~/queries/keys'
    11→
    12→import type { BlockInfo } from './anchor-utils'
    13→import { extractBlockInfos } from './anchor-utils'
    14→import { CommentAnchorHighlight } from './CommentAnchorHighlight'
    15→import { CommentBlockGutter } from './CommentBlockGutter'
    16→import type { CommentAnchor } from './types'
    17→
    18→type CommentWithAnchor = CommentModel & { anchor?: CommentAnchor }
    19→type CommentsQueryData = InfiniteData<
    20→  PaginateResult<CommentWithAnchor & { ref: string }>
    21→>
    22→
    23→function useAnchorCommentsQuery(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
    24→  const { data } = useQuery({
    25→    queryKey: ['comments', refId, 'anchors'],
    26→    queryFn: async () => {
    27→      const data = await apiClient.comment.proxy
    28→        .ref(refId)
    29→        .get<PaginateResult<CommentWithAnchor & { ref: string }>>({
    30→          params: { hasAnchor: 'true', size: 50 },
    31→        })
    32→
    33→      return data
    34→    },
    35→  })
    36→
    37→  return useMemo(() => {
    38→    if (!data) return []
    39→    return data.data
    40→  }, [data])
    41→}
    42→
    43→function useCachedCommentsData(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
    44→  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
    45→  const queryKey = useMemo(() => buildCommentsQueryKey(refId), [refId])
    46→  const queryCache = queryClient.getQueryCache()
    47→
    48→  const data = useSyncExternalStore(
    49→    (onStoreChange) => {
    50→      const unsubscribe = queryCache.subscribe((event) => {
    51→        if (
    52→          event.type === 'updated' &&
    53→          event.query.queryHash === JSON.stringify(queryKey)
    54→        ) {
    55→          onStoreChange()
    56→        }
    57→      })
    58→      return unsubscribe
    59→    },
    60→    () => queryClient.getQueryData<CommentsQueryData>(queryKey),
    61→    () => null as CommentsQueryData | null,
    62→  )
    63→
    64→  return useMemo(() => {
    65→    if (!data) return []
    66→    return data.pages.flatMap((page) => page.data)
    67→  }, [data])
    68→}
    69→
    70→function useMergedAnchorComments(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
    71→  const eagerComments = useAnchorCommentsQuery(refId)
    72→  const cachedComments = useCachedCommentsData(refId)
    73→
    74→  return useMemo(() => {
    75→    const map = new Map<string, CommentWithAnchor>()
    76→    for (const c of eagerComments) map.set(c.id, c)
    77→    for (const c of cachedComments) {
    78→      if ((c as CommentWithAnchor).anchor) map.set(c.id, c)
    79→    }
    80→    return [...map.values()]
    81→  }, [eagerComments, cachedComments])
    82→}
    83→
    84→export function LexicalCommentWrapper({
    85→  content,
    86→  refId,
    87→  title: _title,
    88→  children,
    89→}: PropsWithChildren<{
    90→  content: string
    91→  refId: string
    92→  title: string
    93→}>) {
    94→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    95→  const blockInfos = useMemo<BlockInfo[]>(
    96→    () => extractBlockInfos(content),
    97→    [content],
    98→  )
    99→
   100→  const comments = useMergedAnchorComments(refId)
   101→
   102→  return (
   103→    <div ref={containerRef} className="group/comment-block relative lg:pr-8">
   104→      {children}
   105→      <CommentBlockGutter
   106→        containerRef={containerRef}
   107→        blockInfos={blockInfos}
   108→        comments={comments}
   109→        refId={refId}
   110→      />
   111→      <CommentAnchorHighlight
   112→        containerRef={containerRef}
   113→        blockInfos={blockInfos}
   114→        comments={comments}
   115→      />
   116→    </div>
   117→  )
   118→}
   119→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    35→
    36→export const FloatPopover = function <T extends {}>(
    37→  props: FloatPopoverProps<T> & {
    38→    mobileAsSheet?: boolean
    39→    sheet?: Partial<Omit<PresentSheetProps, 'content'>>
    40→  },
    41→) {
    42→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
    43→  if (isMobile && props.mobileAsSheet) {
    44→    const { triggerElement, TriggerComponent, triggerComponentProps } = props
    45→
    46→    const Child = triggerElement
    47→      ? triggerElement
    48→      : TriggerComponent
    49→        ? createElement(TriggerComponent as any, triggerComponentProps)

    51→
    52→    return (
    53→      <PresentSheet content={props.children} {...props.sheet}>
    54→        {Child}
    55→      </PresentSheet>
    56→    )
    57→  }
    58→  return <RealFloatPopover {...props} />
    59→}
    60→
    61→type FloatPopoverProps<T> = PropsWithChildren<{
    62→  triggerElement?: string | ReactElement<any>
    63→  TriggerComponent?: FC<T>
    64→
    65→  headless?: boolean
    66→  wrapperClassName?: string
    67→  trigger?: 'click' | 'hover' | 'both'

    69→  offset?: number

    71→  popoverClassNames?: string

    79→  animate?: boolean
    80→
    81→  as?: keyof HTMLElementTagNameMap
    82→
    83→  /**

    85→   */
    86→  type?: 'tooltip' | 'popover'
    87→  isDisabled?: boolean
    88→
    89→  to?: HTMLElement
    90→
    91→  onOpen?: () => void
    92→  onClose?: () => void
    93→
    94→  asChild?: boolean
    95→}> &
    96→  UseFloatingOptions
    97→
    98→const PopoverActionContext = createContext<{
    99→  close: () => void
   100→}>(null!)
   101→
   102→export const usePopoverAction = () => use(PopoverActionContext)
   103→
   104→const RealFloatPopover = function FloatPopover<T extends {}>(
   105→  props: FloatPopoverProps<T>,
   106→) {
   107→  const {
   108→    headless = false,
   109→    wrapperClassName: wrapperClassNames,
   110→    TriggerComponent,
   111→    triggerElement,
   112→    trigger = 'hover',
   113→    padding,
   114→    offset: offsetValue,
   115→    popoverWrapperClassNames,
   116→    popoverClassNames,
   117→    debug,
   118→    animate = true,

   121→    triggerComponentProps,

   124→    onClose,
   125→    to,
   126→    asChild,
   127→    ...floatingProps
   128→  } = props
   129→
   130→  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false)
   131→  const { x, y, refs, strategy, isPositioned, elements, update } = useFloating({
   132→    middleware: floatingProps.middleware ?? [
   133→      flip({ padding: padding ?? 20 }),
   134→      offset(offsetValue ?? 10),
   135→      shift(),
   136→    ],
   137→
   138→    strategy: floatingProps.strategy,
   139→    placement: floatingProps.placement ?? 'bottom-start',
   140→    whileElementsMounted: floatingProps.whileElementsMounted,
   141→  })
   142→
   143→  useEffect(() => {
   144→    if (open && elements.reference && elements.floating) {
   145→      const cleanup = autoUpdate(elements.reference, elements.floating, update)
   146→      return cleanup
   147→    }
   148→  }, [open, elements, update])
   149→
   150→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
   151→
   152→  useClickAway(containerRef, () => {
   153→    if (trigger == 'click' || trigger == 'both') {
   154→      doPopoverDisappear()
   155→    }
   156→  })
   157→
   158→  const doPopoverDisappear = useCallback(() => {
   159→    if (debug) {
   160→      return
   161→    }
   162→    setOpen(false)
   163→  }, [debug])
   164→
   165→  const doPopoverShow = useEventCallback(() => {
   166→    if (isDisabled) return
   167→    setOpen(true)
   168→  })
   169→
   170→  const handleMouseOut = useCallback(() => {
   171→    doPopoverDisappear()
   172→  }, [doPopoverDisappear])
   173→
   174→  const listener = useMemo(() => {
   175→    const baseListener = {
   176→      // onFocus: doPopoverShow,
   177→      // onBlur: doPopoverDisappear,
   178→    }
   179→    switch (trigger) {
   180→      case 'click': {
   181→        return {
   182→          ...baseListener,
   183→          onClick: doPopoverShow,
   184→        }
   185→      }
   186→      case 'hover': {
   187→        return {
   188→          ...baseListener,
   189→          onMouseOver: doPopoverShow,
   190→          onMouseOut: doPopoverDisappear,
   191→        }
   192→      }
   193→      case 'both': {
   194→        return {
   195→          ...baseListener,
   196→          onClick: doPopoverShow,
   197→          onMouseOver: doPopoverShow,
   198→          onMouseOut: handleMouseOut,
   199→        }
   200→      }
   201→    }
   202→  }, [doPopoverDisappear, doPopoverShow, handleMouseOut, trigger])
   203→
   204→  const Child = triggerElement ? (
   205→    triggerElement
   206→  ) : TriggerComponent ? (
   207→    React.cloneElement(
   208→      createElement(TriggerComponent as any, triggerComponentProps),
   209→
   210→      {
   211→        tabIndex: 0,
   212→      },
   213→    )
   214→  ) : (
   215→    <></>
   216→  )
   217→  const TriggerWrapper = asChild ? (
   218→    React.cloneElement(
   219→      typeof Child === 'string' ? <span>{Child}</span> : Child,
   220→      {
   221→        ...listener,
   222→        ref: refs.setReference,
   223→      },
   224→    )
   225→  ) : (
   226→    <As
   227→      // @ts-ignore
   228→      role={trigger === 'both' || trigger === 'click' ? 'button' : 'note'}
   229→      className={clsxm('inline-block', wrapperClassNames)}
   230→      ref={refs.setReference}
   231→      {...listener}
   232→    >
   233→      {Child}
   234→    </As>
   235→  )
   236→
   237→  useEffect(() => {
   238→    if (refs.floating.current && open && type === 'popover') {
```
